sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57450" key="ki/ndos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κίνδος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a fragrant herb, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0476.tlg001:4:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mnesim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.63</biblScope> </bibl> (anap.).</entryFree>
